chain_of_thought: As a calendar solver: 36 hours = 2 days before 01/01/2015 → 12/30/2014 → +7 days = 01/05/2015.
As a calendar solver: 01/01/2019 is Tuesday, so first Monday is 6 days later → 01/07/2019.
As a calendar solver: correct date 03/12/2002; +1 day = 03/13/2002.
As a calendar solver: 02/28/2001; 16-year birthday 02/28/2017; yesterday 02/27/2017.
